title: Penetration Condition
description: Records how a penetrating element passes through a building enclosure assembly. Tracks affected control layers and seal method.

penetration_id.description: Unique identifier for this penetration condition.

assembly_ref.description: Reference to the assembly system being penetrated.

status.description: Current status of this penetration record.

control_layers_affected.description: Control layers interrupted by this penetration.

seal_method.description: Method used to restore control-layer continuity around the penetration.

detail_ref.description: Reference to penetration detail drawing or specification.

risk_level.description: Risk level assigned to this penetration condition.

notes.description: Additional notes about this penetration condition.
